nasb.text: When it goes well with the righteous, the city rejoices, And when the wicked perish, there is joyful shouting.

esv.text: When it goes well with the righteous, the city rejoices, and when the wicked perish there are shouts of gladness.

cnv.text: 義人亨通，全城歡樂； 惡人滅亡，大家歡呼。

ccb.text: 义人亨通，全城快乐； 恶人灭亡，人人欢呼。

csbs.text: 义人享福，全城欢庆； 恶人灭亡，必有欢呼。
